cards.back: Refers to the systematic error caused by an AI system's learning data, leading to unequal treatment of certain groups of patients
Involves stages such as data collection, model development, testing, and deployment, to ensure the safe and effective use of AI in healthcare
Aims to provide insights into how AI systems arrive at their decisions, increasing transparency and trust in AI-driven healthcare outcomes
Involves laws, guidelines, and standards to oversee the development, deployment, and use of AI in healthcare, ensuring safety and efficacy
Involves designing AI systems that reflect human values, such as respect for patient autonomy and dignity, to ensure that AI is used in ways that align with societal norms
